texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: THE RESORT ACCOMMODATION CONTRACT
texts.text: THE RESORT ACCOMMODATION CONTRACT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This agreement is for Accommodation Rates/Offers;
texts.text: This agreement is for Accommodation Rates/Offers;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Between
texts.text: Between

texts.label: text
texts.orig: TAITA HILLS & SALT LICK WILDLIFE RESORT LTD LOCATED in  Taita  Hills  Wildlife  Sanctuary  whose  address  is  P.O  Box  80861,  Postal  code 80100, Mombasa, Kenya hereinafter called THE RESORT, operating SALT LICK SAFARI LODGE AND TAITA HILLS SAFARI RESORT & SPA
texts.text: TAITA HILLS & SALT LICK WILDLIFE RESORT LTD LOCATED in  Taita  Hills  Wildlife  Sanctuary  whose  address  is  P.O  Box  80861,  Postal  code 80100, Mombasa, Kenya hereinafter called THE RESORT, operating SALT LICK SAFARI LODGE AND TAITA HILLS SAFARI RESORT & SPA

texts.label: text
texts.orig: And
texts.text: And

texts.label: text
texts.orig: BOUNTIFUL SAFARIS P.O. Box Nairobi whose registered office is located at Nairobi-Kenya hereinafter called THE AGENT.
texts.text: BOUNTIFUL SAFARIS P.O. Box Nairobi whose registered office is located at Nairobi-Kenya hereinafter called THE AGENT.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Subject of the Contract
texts.text: Subject of the Contract

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  parties  agree  on  the  following conditions  for  the Accommodation Rates/Offers  which  are  All  quoted  in US$ and  are inclusive of taxes, service charge and are non-commissionable.
texts.text: The  parties  agree  on  the  following conditions  for  the Accommodation Rates/Offers  which  are  All  quoted  in US$ and  are inclusive of taxes, service charge and are non-commissionable.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Validity Period
texts.text: Validity Period

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The agreement is effective from 2 nd  January 2025- to 1 st  January 2026
texts.text: The agreement is effective from 2 nd  January 2025- to 1 st  January 2026

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy
texts.text: Child Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child from infant to age 4yrs sharing with 1 or 2 adults -FOC at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa
texts.text: Child from infant to age 4yrs sharing with 1 or 2 adults -FOC at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. sharing with 1 or two adults -50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. sharing with 1 or two adults -50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -Maximum three guests per room
texts.text: -Maximum three guests per room

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. in own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) -75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. in own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) -75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -If children are younger than 12 yrs., they should share connecting rooms (subject to availability)
texts.text: -If children are younger than 12 yrs., they should share connecting rooms (subject to availability)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For safety reasons, children under the age of 5 years are not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge
texts.text: For safety reasons, children under the age of 5 years are not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Please see occupancy rules below;
texts.text: Please see occupancy rules below;

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Occupancy Rules;
texts.text: Occupancy Rules;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Salt Lick Safari Lodge -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)
texts.text: Salt Lick Safari Lodge -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Subject to availability of triple rooms with Park view at Salt Lick Safari Lodge Triple rooms not possible in the Waterfront view rooms at Salt Lick Safari Lodge Interconnecting rooms are NOT available at Salt Lick Safari Lodge
texts.text: Subject to availability of triple rooms with Park view at Salt Lick Safari Lodge Triple rooms not possible in the Waterfront view rooms at Salt Lick Safari Lodge Interconnecting rooms are NOT available at Salt Lick Safari Lodge

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)
texts.text: Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Subject to availability of triple rooms
texts.text: Subject to availability of triple rooms

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Interconnecting rooms are available at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa.
texts.text: Interconnecting rooms are available at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Suites- Maximum 2 adults and 1 child
texts.text: The Suites- Maximum 2 adults and 1 child

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Policy
texts.text: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Sanctuary entry fees apply at US$ 40 per Adult/ child US$ 20 per night: 2 nd  January 2025- 1st January 2026/ children below 5yrs FOC.
texts.text: Sanctuary entry fees apply at US$ 40 per Adult/ child US$ 20 per night: 2 nd  January 2025- 1st January 2026/ children below 5yrs FOC.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Sanctuary entry fees do not apply for stays at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa unless guests enter the sanctuary for game activities.
texts.text: Sanctuary entry fees do not apply for stays at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa unless guests enter the sanctuary for game activities.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Vehicle Entry Fees;
texts.text: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Vehicle Entry Fees;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please note every vehicle accessing Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary will be subject to Vehicle Entry Fees payable per vehicle, per night.
texts.text: Please note every vehicle accessing Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary will be subject to Vehicle Entry Fees payable per vehicle, per night.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Tour Leaders
texts.text: Tour Leaders

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Tour Leaders will be on complimentary based on 1 per 15 full paying pax provided it is pre-booked and confirmed to a maximum of 3 tour leaders.
texts.text: Tour Leaders will be on complimentary based on 1 per 15 full paying pax provided it is pre-booked and confirmed to a maximum of 3 tour leaders.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Tour Leader for groups less than 15 full paying pax will enjoy 50% of single or twin based rate.  This must be pre-booked and confirmed.
texts.text: Tour Leader for groups less than 15 full paying pax will enjoy 50% of single or twin based rate.  This must be pre-booked and confirmed.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All other supplements & sanctuary fees apply to tour leaders irrespective of passenger numbers in the group.
texts.text: All other supplements & sanctuary fees apply to tour leaders irrespective of passenger numbers in the group.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Agent / FAM Trip Rates
texts.text: Agent / FAM Trip Rates

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Agents Rates /FAM trips will enjoy 50% of single contracted rate for single room use per night, and 75% of double contracted rate for double/twin room stay.
texts.text: Agents Rates /FAM trips will enjoy 50% of single contracted rate for single room use per night, and 75% of double contracted rate for double/twin room stay.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All other supplements & Sanctuary fees apply to agents.
texts.text: All other supplements & Sanctuary fees apply to agents.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The Agent Rates do not apply during the Christmas & Easter dates.
texts.text: The Agent Rates do not apply during the Christmas & Easter dates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Agents' Rates are on a request basis & subject to availability.
texts.text: Agents' Rates are on a request basis & subject to availability.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Group Discounts
texts.text: Group Discounts

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 30-49 guests 5% off applicable contract rates
texts.text: 30-49 guests 5% off applicable contract rates

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 50-99 guests -7.5% off applicable contract rates
texts.text: 50-99 guests -7.5% off applicable contract rates

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 100 guests and over -10% off applicable contract rates
texts.text: 100 guests and over -10% off applicable contract rates

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For every 15 pax paying, 1 pax sharing goes free up to a maximum of 3 pax per group booking.
texts.text: For every 15 pax paying, 1 pax sharing goes free up to a maximum of 3 pax per group booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Maximum 4 single rooms per group
texts.text: Maximum 4 single rooms per group

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -Single rooms of more than 4 pay sole use of double/twin room rate.
texts.text: -Single rooms of more than 4 pay sole use of double/twin room rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Day Room & Check-In/ Checkout Policy
texts.text: Day Room & Check-In/ Checkout Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Check-in time 1200hrs
texts.text: Check-in time 1200hrs

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Checkout time 1000hrs
texts.text: Checkout time 1000hrs

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Day rooms can be booked for 50% of the double/single room rate for use until 17h00 inclusive of lunch.
texts.text: Day rooms can be booked for 50% of the double/single room rate for use until 17h00 inclusive of lunch.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Day rooms are subject to the same occupancy rules as overnight rules.
texts.text: Day rooms are subject to the same occupancy rules as overnight rules.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Departure from the room after 17h00hrs is charged at full overnight rate.
texts.text: Departure from the room after 17h00hrs is charged at full overnight rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Walk-in Meals / Additional Meals (as per COVID-19 guidelines and protocols)
texts.text: Walk-in Meals / Additional Meals (as per COVID-19 guidelines and protocols)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Hot Buffet breakfast at US$ 25 per person
texts.text: Hot Buffet breakfast at US$ 25 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Hot Buffet lunch at US$ 25 per person
texts.text: Hot Buffet lunch at US$ 25 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Buffet dinner at US$ 30 per person
texts.text: Buffet dinner at US$ 30 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Additional picnic box meal (breakfast, lunch, or dinner) US$ 20 per person
texts.text: Additional picnic box meal (breakfast, lunch, or dinner) US$ 20 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children pay 50% of the above meals rate.
texts.text: Children pay 50% of the above meals rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Half Board Reduction
texts.text: Half Board Reduction

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · HB reduction US$ 5 per adult /child per night
texts.text: HB reduction US$ 5 per adult /child per night

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS & CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS & CONDITIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. All terms and conditions apply.
texts.text: All terms and conditions apply.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Above rates include Statutory Government Taxes (VAT, Service Charge & Catering Levy)
texts.text: Above rates include Statutory Government Taxes (VAT, Service Charge & Catering Levy)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. Booking Terms:
texts.text: 3. Booking Terms:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -All booking vouchers must be sent to reservations office for confirmation of availability and subsequent reservations of the same upon availability.
texts.text: -All booking vouchers must be sent to reservations office for confirmation of availability and subsequent reservations of the same upon availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -Accommodation request/booking vouchers to specify and must clearly show the unit being booked by email to:
texts.text: -Accommodation request/booking vouchers to specify and must clearly show the unit being booked by email to:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -for Salt Lick Safari Lodge; reservations@saltlicksafarilodge.com
texts.text: -for Salt Lick Safari Lodge; reservations@saltlicksafarilodge.com

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -for Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa; reservations@taitahillssafariresort.com
texts.text: -for Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa; reservations@taitahillssafariresort.com

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. Payments Terms:
texts.text: 4. Payments Terms:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cash Payments: All bookings must be accompanied by a travel agency voucher and paid before the arrival date. Cheques will not be accepted.
texts.text: Cash Payments: All bookings must be accompanied by a travel agency voucher and paid before the arrival date. Cheques will not be accepted.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 5. Applicability:
texts.text: 5. Applicability:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This contract is valid for non-residents and for leisure business only. A valid copy of Identification will be required at check-in. These rates are not for onward distribution to 3 rd  party on-line travel/hotel booking websites.
texts.text: This contract is valid for non-residents and for leisure business only. A valid copy of Identification will be required at check-in. These rates are not for onward distribution to 3 rd  party on-line travel/hotel booking websites.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 6. Cancelation and No-Show
texts.text: 6. Cancelation and No-Show

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If the Agent cancels the reservation the Resorts has the right to apply the following cancellation conditions:
texts.text: If the Agent cancels the reservation the Resorts has the right to apply the following cancellation conditions:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -30 to 16 days before arrival date - 20% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.
texts.text: -30 to 16 days before arrival date - 20% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -15 to 8 days before arrival date - 40% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.
texts.text: -15 to 8 days before arrival date - 40% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -7 to 3 days before arrival date - 75% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.
texts.text: -7 to 3 days before arrival date - 75% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -2 days- to date of arrival - 100% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.
texts.text: -2 days- to date of arrival - 100% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7. Variation in rates, and/or taxes and/or service charge
texts.text: 7. Variation in rates, and/or taxes and/or service charge

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Resort and Lodge may at its discretion, by not less than one month's notice in writing to the Agent alter the contracted rates. In the event  of  any  appreciation  of  the  Kenya  shilling  of  over  5%  vis-à-vis  the  currency  in  which  the  contract  is  drawn  or  any  changes  in government taxes, training levy or service charge, The Resort and Lodge reserves the right to adjust these rates accordingly, from the date of such changes and/or any variations.
texts.text: The Resort and Lodge may at its discretion, by not less than one month's notice in writing to the Agent alter the contracted rates. In the event  of  any  appreciation  of  the  Kenya  shilling  of  over  5%  vis-à-vis  the  currency  in  which  the  contract  is  drawn  or  any  changes  in government taxes, training levy or service charge, The Resort and Lodge reserves the right to adjust these rates accordingly, from the date of such changes and/or any variations.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8. Confidentiality
texts.text: 8. Confidentiality

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Agent confirms and agrees that this Agreement is confidential to the Agent and Taita Hills & Salt Lick Wildlife Resort Ltd and the Agent shall not in any circumstances divulge or permit to divulge this agreement or its contents to any other person.
texts.text: The Agent confirms and agrees that this Agreement is confidential to the Agent and Taita Hills & Salt Lick Wildlife Resort Ltd and the Agent shall not in any circumstances divulge or permit to divulge this agreement or its contents to any other person.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 9. Miscellaneous
texts.text: 9. Miscellaneous

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Amendments to this agreement shall be valid only if made in writing and signed by the Agent and The Resort. The waiver of any of the terms on any occasion shall not be deemed a waiver of such terms and conditions for any further occasion. All notices to be served shall be sent to the address of the party to be served as specified herein.
texts.text: Amendments to this agreement shall be valid only if made in writing and signed by the Agent and The Resort. The waiver of any of the terms on any occasion shall not be deemed a waiver of such terms and conditions for any further occasion. All notices to be served shall be sent to the address of the party to be served as specified herein.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 10. Force Majeure
texts.text: 10. Force Majeure

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Acts of nature may affect the ability of the Resort to provide accommodation as stated in this agreement.  In this case, the liability of the Resort is limited to the refund of amounts paid.
texts.text: Acts of nature may affect the ability of the Resort to provide accommodation as stated in this agreement.  In this case, the liability of the Resort is limited to the refund of amounts paid.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 11. Overbooking and Rerouting
texts.text: 11. Overbooking and Rerouting

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the unlikely instance that the Resort is unable to accommodate guests on a confirmed reservation, the Resort reserves the right to ask the Agent to consider revising the routing of the itinerary or amend the arrival date.
texts.text: In the unlikely instance that the Resort is unable to accommodate guests on a confirmed reservation, the Resort reserves the right to ask the Agent to consider revising the routing of the itinerary or amend the arrival date.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 12. Governance
texts.text: 12. Governance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This agreement is governed by the laws of Kenya and all disputes will be subject to Kenyan law.
texts.text: This agreement is governed by the laws of Kenya and all disputes will be subject to Kenyan law.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 13. Distribution: Both contractual parties confirm that they have received a written copy of this agreement in English.
texts.text: Distribution: Both contractual parties confirm that they have received a written copy of this agreement in English.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Authorized Signatories;
texts.text: Authorized Signatories;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The contract rates herein will only be valid once both parties have signed off this contract;
texts.text: The contract rates herein will only be valid once both parties have signed off this contract;
